prompt: A photorealistic candid photograph of two Asian women shopping together inside a densely packed vintage clothing store. The woman on the left has brown hair tied back and is wearing a white ribbed crop top and distressed denim shorts, carrying a cream shoulder bag. She is holding up a dark blue satin souvenir jacket with intricate gold embroidery on a wooden hanger. The woman on the right has her hair in a messy bun and is wearing a white graphic t-shirt tucked into high-waisted blue jeans, looking admiringly at the jacket. They are standing in a narrow aisle flanked by overflowing racks of colorful garments, with more clothes hanging from the ceiling. The scene features warm, slightly dim ambient lighting with a shallow depth of field blurring the background.
